title: Packet 026 And Packet 027 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 026 closure handoff, Packet 027 reassessment handoff, Packet 027 completion state, and minimal routing or roadmap authority updates through `C:/APEX Platform`, then fast-forward-only synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` so later host-side trials do not depend on workstation-only governance records.
active_role: Olares Post-027 Authority Publication And Resync Operator
dependency_note: Packet 027 reclassifies the workstation-migration lane as narrow application-source-trial-ready, not migration-ready, and identifies Packet 026 plus Packet 027 closure authority as workstation-local post-publication drift. This packet may open only as an authority publication and host-mirror resync lane.
required_inputs: Current workstation parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform`
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, cleanliness, and missing/present Packet 026 and Packet 027 closure authority evidence
constrained_outputs: A bounded publication commit containing only Packet 026 and Packet 027 closure authority plus minimal routing or roadmap updates and this Packet 028 JSON
A dated execution handoff recording publication scope, commit hash, push disposition, host fast-forward-only resync evidence, and old-clone preservation

No runtime mutation, service change, install work, package or lockfile change, production-source edit, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, AI-services rollout, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, or old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Verify Packet 027 completed and did not approve migration.
Verify `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at the Packet 026 governing commit before publication.
Limit the publication set to Packet 026 and Packet 027 closure authority, minimal routing or roadmap updates, and this Packet 028 JSON.
Exclude `.vercelignore`, runtime artifacts, generated artifacts, secrets, package files, lockfiles, production source, and unrelated workspace changes.
Publish the bounded parent-root commit to `clean-main` and record the commit hash.
Fast-forward-only synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit.
Verify the host mirror is clean and contains Packet 026 and Packet 027 closure authority.
Stop if additional host drift exists or if resync would require force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, runtime mutation, service mutation, install work, or old-clone mutation.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes only bounded authority publication and host-mirror resync. It does not authorize database writes, runtime mutation, service changes, install work, package changes, production-source changes, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, migration approval, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Not yet executed. Packet 028 is prepared as the bounded authority publication and host-mirror resync gate after Packet 027.
next_action: Execute only as a bounded authority publication and host parity restoration lane. Do not use Packet 028 to approve migration, mutate runtime, change services, install dependencies, edit production source, rewrite remotes, force, reset, clean, or mutate the old clone.
